channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: Paraguay recalls ambassador to Brazil and suspends dam talks over espionage revelations
item.description: Paraguay says it's recalling its ambassador to Brazil a day after Brazilian authorities acknowledged that their country’s intelligence agency had spied on Paraguayan officials in 2022.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Institute of Peace headquarters transfer is a done deal even as lawsuit continues to unfold
item.description: There is no answer yet on the lawsuit filed by Institute of Peace board members who were fired amid a remaking of the independent think tank.
item.dc:creator: Gary Fields, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Fourth US soldier missing in Lithuania found dead
item.description: “Tragically, three soldiers were found deceased in Lithuania yesterday, and it pains me to confirm that today the fourth soldier was also found deceased,” White House said.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Here's a look at the election ban on France's far-right Le Pen and the legal issues
item.description: PARIS (AP) — French far-right leader Marine Le Pen has denounced as “a democratic scandal” the court ruling that placed a five-year ban on her seeking public office for embezzling European Union funds. The Paris court says it would be undemocratic to allow a convicted official to run for president.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIE CORBET, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Most in survey of Europeans support retaliatory tariffs against US
item.description: Most Western Europeans are supportive of the continent’s intent to fire back when President Trump moves forward with tariffs set to take effect Wednesday, according to a survey released on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: At just 29, Jordan Bardella inherits the French far-right spotlight, whether he’s ready or not
item.description: PARIS (AP) — He wears his suits like armor, smiles like a pop star and boasts more than 2 million followers on TikTok.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS ADAMSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Putin conscripts 160K men as Russia eyes Ukraine offensive
item.description: Russia's largest military draft in 14 years sees 160,000 men called up as Putin plans a spring offensive on Ukraine. Despite stalled U.S. ceasefire talks, the Kremlin insists conscripts won't fight.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mexico's security chief quietly forms an elite force to take on the drug cartels
item.description: Six years ago Mexico’s president disbanded the country’s Federal Police and handed security responsibilities fully to the military.
item.dc:creator: María Verza, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Survivors still being found from Burma earthquake, but hopes begin to fade as deaths exceed 2,700
item.description: Burma was hit by a 7.7 magnitude earthquake on Friday, killing more than 2,700 people, compounding a humanitarian crisis caused by a civil war. Thailand also sustained damage.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pope's work during convalescence includes clearing path for saints from Venezuela, Papua New Guinea
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — Pope Francis spends part of his days at his desk working and concelebrates Mass daily in his private chapel, the Vatican said Tuesday, in signs of continued improvements during his convalescence at the Vatican after beating life-threatening double pneumonia during a five-week hos
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN BARRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A fireball from a burst gas pipeline in Malaysia injures 145 people
item.description: KUALA LUMPUR, Malaysia (AP) — A fireball that erupted from a burst gas pipeline soared into the sky outside Malaysia's largest city and injured 145 people as it burned for several hours before being put out, authorities said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Musk slams Le Pen ruling, says it will 'backfire' like Trump's as some on global right face legal troubles
item.description: Marine Le Pen’s sentencing in France has drawn global attention, with parallels made to legal battles faced by President Donald Trump, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, and former Brazilian President Jair Bolsonaro, among other right-wing politicians.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Germany sees Ukraine truce efforts as deadlocked, while China says the talks are encouraging
item.description: Germany’s chief diplomat is describing U.S. President Donald Trump’s efforts to secure a truce in the three-year war between Russia and Ukraine as deadlocked.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Volcano erupts in southwestern Iceland after a nearby town and spa are evacuated
item.description: A volcano in southwestern Iceland that has erupted repeatedly for more than a year again belched lava and smoke into the air, just hours after authorities evacuated the few remaining residents of a nearby fishing village.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump wants new Iran nuclear deal after he withdrew from the first
item.description: Trump withdrew the U.S from the deal during his first term, claiming it was “the worst and most one-sided transaction.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: Red Cross: Israel killed 8 Palestinian medics in strikes on ambulances
item.description: The Red Cross said Israel killed eight Palestinian medics when it struck ambulances in southern Gaza. United Nations officials said the Red Cross workers' bodies, along with other Palestinian rescue workers, were recovered from a grave in the sand, Reuters reported.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Trump administration deports more migrants to Salvadoran prison
item.description: The Trump administration has deported another 17 men it claims are affiliated with gangs to a Salvadoran prison.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Finland's president says Trump growing 'impatient' with Putin
item.description: Finnish President Alexander Stubb said in a new interview that President Trump seemed to be growing “impatient” with Russian President Vladimir Putin, who rejected a U.S. ceasefire proposal and added various conditions to a more limited deal. Stubb, who played golf with the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Greenland's prime minister says US will not 'get' island
item.description: Jens-Frederik Nielsen, Greenland's prime minister, said in a Facebook post on Sunday that the United States will not be able to annex the resource-rich island in the Atlantic.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israeli forces order evacuation for most of Rafah ahead of attack on the area
item.description: The Israeli military issued evacuation orders on Monday for most of Rafah and suggested it may soon launch another ground operation in the city.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump finds fault with both Putin and Zelenskyy as he tries to push for deal to end war in Ukraine
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump lashed out at both Vladimir Putin and Volodymyr Zelenskyy on Sunday, expressing frustration with the Russian and Ukrainian leaders as he struggles to forge a truce to end the war.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Smell of death permeates Myanmar cities after quake kills over 1,600, leaves others buried
item.description: The 7.7 magnitude quake hit midday Friday with an epicenter near Mandalay, bringing down scores of buildings and damaging other infrastructure like the city’s airport.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Landmark UK report on Hamas massacre exposes worst attack on Jews since Holocaust
item.description: A UK Parliament report chaired by respected historian Lord Andrew Roberts calls the Oct. 7 Hamas attack in Israel deliberate and brutal, urging democracies to combat denial and misinformation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Atlantic releases full Signal text chain
item.description: The Atlantic editor-in-chief on Wednesday released the full text message chain between Trump administration officials.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation
